name: Quaker Omelet
recipeInstructions:
1. Put heavy frying pan with close-fitting cover on to heat.
2. Separate eggs and beat yolks until thick.
3. Add cornstarch to the beaten yolks.
4. Beat whites stiffly.
5. Add the white mixture to the yolk mixture, then add milk and season with salt and pepper.
6. Melt butter in the hot pan.
7. Pour in the mixture.
8. Cover closely and cook over medium heat for 6 or 7 minutes.
9. Remove the cover and fold the omelet in half.
10. Do not lift the cover until fully cooked.
